examples: On inquiring further about him I learned that he was a universal favorite in the village, and the oracle of the taproom;
Maybe only you can read this. I'm really happy being with you in the taproom. Maybe you don't like me at all. Could I know your feeling?
One of his favourite targets was the "pale and bilious" taproom agitator, scheming to overturn John Bull's household, or Peter Stuyvesant's New York.
